title: Salto, SA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Salto, SA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Salto is a city in SA with a population of 120,000. A northwestern city on the Uruguay River, known for its hot springs and citrus production.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
